headline: Biel: Salesforce’s transaction data gives it real competitive protection
summary: Not all enterprise software moats are created equal. That’s the framework analyst Biel laid out recently when assessing which software companies can actually survive the AI wave, and which ones just look protected until they aren’t. headline: Adobe (ADBE) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Over the coming months, I will be working with Frank Calderoni, Adobe's Lead Director and the Board of Directors to identify my successor and to ensure a smooth transition.  Until then, I will continue to lead Adobe as CEO and will stay on as Chair of the Board to support my successor just as John and Chuck did when I took on this role.  What attracted me to Adobe 28 years ago remains unchanged: our leadership in creating new market categories, world-class products, a relentless drive to innovate in every functional area of the company and our employees who continue to invent the future.

headline: Adobe CEO Exit Puts AI Growth And Valuation In Investor Focus
summary: Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) announced that CEO Shantanu Narayen will step down after a successor is appointed, ending an 18 year tenure. The leadership update came alongside Q1 results that the company described as strong, with 12% revenue growth. Adobe also reported that its AI first annualized recurring revenue has tripled, signaling rapid uptake of new AI offerings. Adobe is best known for its Creative Cloud and Document Cloud franchises, which sit at the center of content creation, marketing...
